title: Plugin Least-Privilege Enforcement & Plugin-Trust Security — Design
summary: Defines runtime semantics for manifest `access:`/`scope:` least-privilege parameters, a default-deny ABAC decision on plugin capability/service access keyed on host-stamped subjects, a host-vouched dispatch-context primitive, and a symmetric fix for the PR #4430 plugin-trust (subject-spoofing) finding across Lua and binary runtimes.
scope: ABAC access gate for capability/service access
